name: Taipei
tagline: Night Markets, National Health Insurance, and Incredible Value
description: Taipei is one of Asia's best-kept secrets for FIRE retirees. The city combines jaw-droppingly affordable healthcare through Taiwan's National Health Insurance, one of the world's best food scenes (from $3 night market feasts to Michelin restaurants), and a safe, efficient urban environment with excellent public transit. The cost of living is remarkably low for the quality of life on offer, and the Taiwanese people are famously welcoming to foreigners.

quickFacts.visa: 90-day visa-free for US citizens. Resident visa available with proof of financial means (~$25K+ in savings). Gold Card available for high-income individuals ($160K+/year). Retiree-friendly entry with easy renewals.
quickFacts.safetyRating: Very High – extremely low crime rate
quickFacts.climate: Subtropical with hot humid summers and mild winters

housing.description: 1BR apartment in Zhonghe, Banqiao, or outer Taipei near an MRT station

dining.description: Night market meals daily, local bento boxes, beef noodle soup shops

healthcare.description: Taiwan NHI enrollment — world-class coverage at minimal cost

transportation.description: EasyCard for MRT, buses, and YouBike; the system is clean and fast

entertainment.description: Temple visits, riverside cycling, hiking Elephant Mountain, night market culture

1M.lifestyle: A 1-bedroom apartment in Zhonghe, Banqiao, or outer Taipei near an MRT station. Eating mostly at night markets and local bento shops — beef noodle soup, dumplings, and stir-fries for a few dollars per meal. Getting around on the clean, fast MRT. Taiwan's National Health Insurance provides world-class coverage at minimal cost. The apartment will be modest, but the food, healthcare, transit, and safety are hard to beat at this price. English is moderate — some adaptation is needed for daily errands.

housing.description: Modern 2BR apartment in Da'an, Xinyi, or a newer building in Zhongshan

dining.description: Dining out daily — mix of night markets, Japanese restaurants, hot pot, and trendy cafes

healthcare.description: NHI plus supplemental private insurance for premium hospital rooms

transportation.description: MRT pass plus occasional taxis, weekend trips by HSR bullet train

entertainment.description: Hot spring trips to Beitou, concerts, gym membership, weekend trips to Jiufen and Sun Moon Lake

2M.lifestyle: A modern 2-bedroom apartment in the desirable Da'an or Xinyi districts, or a newer building in Zhongshan. Dining out daily at night markets, Japanese restaurants, hot pot spots, and trendy cafes without watching the bill. MRT for daily transit with weekend trips by HSR bullet train to Taichung or Kaohsiung. NHI plus supplemental private insurance. Hot spring trips to Beitou and hiking in the surrounding mountains. Life is comfortable and the value is strong for a developed Asian capital.

housing.description: Spacious 3BR apartment in Xinyi District near Taipei 101, or a luxury unit in Tianmu

dining.description: Fine dining at Michelin-starred restaurants like RAW, premium sushi, wine bar culture

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance with VIP access to top hospitals like National Taiwan University Hospital

transportation.description: Leased car for mountain trips, MRT for city travel, regular HSR to Kaohsiung and Taichung

entertainment.description: Premium hot spring resorts, golf memberships, cultural events, frequent domestic travel

3M.lifestyle: A spacious 3-bedroom apartment in Xinyi District near Taipei 101, or a luxury unit in the expat-friendly Tianmu area. Regular dining at Michelin-starred restaurants like RAW and premium sushi spots. A leased car for mountain trips, with MRT for city travel and regular HSR to other cities. Premium private health insurance with VIP hospital access. Weekend escapes to Taroko Gorge or Kenting beaches. This is a genuinely affluent lifestyle in a city where costs are moderate — very little feels out of reach.

housing.description: Luxury penthouse in Xinyi or a premium villa in Yangmingshan with mountain views

dining.description: Regular Michelin dining, private chef access, exclusive tea ceremony experiences, wine collecting

healthcare.description: Concierge medical service with top specialists and international coverage

transportation.description: Luxury car (BMW, Mercedes), driver for city errands, first-class HSR travel

entertainment.description: Exclusive cultural events, premium resort memberships, art collecting, regional luxury travel

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, weekly deep cleaning, laundry service, part-time assistant

luxuryExtras.description: First-class regional travel, luxury resort stays, rare tea collecting, philanthropy in Taiwan

5M.lifestyle: A luxury penthouse in Xinyi or a premium villa in Yangmingshan with mountain views. A full-time housekeeper, a part-time assistant, and a luxury car with a driver for city errands. Regular dining at Taipei's best restaurants, first-class HSR travel, concierge medical service, and business class flights for regional travel. This budget goes far in Taipei — daily life is very comfortable with significant room to spare, and Taiwan's food culture, safety, and natural beauty are hard to match.

housing.description: Ultra-luxury residence in One Park Taipei or a sprawling Yangmingshan estate

dining.description: Personal chef, private dining at Taiwan's finest restaurants, exclusive food experiences

healthcare.description: VIP international concierge medicine with global hospital network access

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, dedicated driver, first-class international travel

entertainment.description: Art patronage, private cultural experiences, international luxury travel, exclusive memberships

domesticHelp.description: Full household staff including chef, housekeeper, personal assistant, driver, and gardener

luxuryExtras.description: Private jet access, international property, rare art and tea acquisitions, philanthropic foundation

10M.lifestyle: A premium residence in One Park Taipei or a large Yangmingshan estate, with a housekeeper, a cook a few times a week, a personal assistant, a driver, and a gardener. First-class international flights, regular travel across East Asia, VIP concierge medicine, and regular fine dining as routine. This is more money than Taipei's market demands for a top-tier life — you live very well with no financial friction. Taipei is a safe, well-run city with deep food culture, though its luxury and entertainment options are more limited than Tokyo, Hong Kong, or Singapore.
